name: findkoi-be
description: Microservices backend scaffold with Node.js and Express

scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w services/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w services/auth-service"
scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,auth -c cyan,green "npm run start -w services/api-gateway" "npm run start -w services/auth-service"
